working_on.notes: Đã triển khai logic đánh chặn form submit cho Shipping và Billing. Cần user nhúng script vào Sitecore theme.

decisions_made.decision: Use Vanilla JS bridge for Sitecore Forms
decisions_made.reason: BasicForm is generic and cannot be easily modified with custom Zod logic without rebuilding the whole component.
